boxDescription: The fuse block under the hood is in the engine compartment, on the driver's side of the vehicle. To remove the fuse block cover, press the cover latches and lift it straight up. To remove the fuses, use the fuse puller and pull straight out. The vehicle may not have all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.

boxDescription: The instrument panel fuse block is located inside the center column, on the passenger side of the vehicle. Remove the fuse access door by inserting a coin or tool into the slot of the access door. To remove a fuse, use the fuse puller located in the engine compartment fuse block. The vehicle may not have all the fuses, relays, and features illustrated.

boxDescription:
The rear compartment fuse block is located behind the trim panel on the driver side of the rear storage compartment. The trim panel is removed by prying along the upper edge of the trim panel at two notch positions. Remove the trim panel to access the fuse block.
The fuse block label is located on the back of the access door on the driver side rear trim panel.
